name: @apdos/runtime-orchestrator
description: Runtime Skill Orchestration for connecting APDOS workflow execution to skill governance and runtime execution.

scripts.test: npm --workspace @apdos/skill-governance run build && npm --workspace @apdos/skill-registry run build && npm --workspace @apdos/skill-runtime run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test dist/tests/**/*.test.js
